description_long: This is a traditional hand axe featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural wood grain finish. The handle is ergonomically shaped, tapering at the end for a secure grip and widening near the head for strength. The axe head is made of metal, with a single broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite side. The blade has a dark, slightly weathered appearance, suggesting it is forged steel, and is securely mounted to the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for chopping wood or other heavy-duty tasks. There are no visible decorative elements or branding, emphasizing its practical function.
description: A traditional hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a single broad metal blade, designed for chopping tasks. The axe has a utilitarian, robust appearance with a natural wood finish and a dark steel head.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: A side profile view shows the full length of the handle, emphasizing its slender, slightly curved shape and the compactness of the axe head.
description_view_2: A front-facing view displays the blade edge and the thickness of the axe head, as well as the ergonomic curve of the handle.
description_view_3: A direct side view reveals the broad face of the blade and the full length of the handle, showing the attachment point between the head and handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural finish, ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and slight flare at the end.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll, no beard, and a straight cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle and secured by friction or a wedge.
